user.title: Add X-PoE switch
user.description: {scan_status}. Select one or enter an IP manually.

manual.title: Add X-PoE switch by IP

creds.title: Set up discovered X-PoE switch
creds.description:
Found X-PoE switch at {host} (MAC {mac}).

Enter the credentials to finish setup. They are documented in the install guide: {creds_docs}

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the switch. Check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check the install guide for credentials: https://docs.luum.io/install_guides/xs_108h_ig/
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant log.

abort.already_configured: This X-PoE switch is already configured.
abort.not_xpoe_device: Discovered service does not appear to be an X-PoE switch.
